retrieved_result: Welcome to Home Base Welcome to Home Base Home Base is North Carolina’s suite of digital tools and instructional resources designed to empower teachers, engage students, support administrators and connect parents to their child’s personalized learning. Since its inception into the public schools of North Carolina in 201
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page describes educational resources for North Carolina public schools and does not pertain to software development or IDEs.
